phase: D1+D2 — proof-of-payment receipt wired into the UI

live_contracts.note: Live demo set the wallet, merchant register, and verify view all share (config.ts). Pool/asp were redeployed fresh here so the live ASP tree stays small enough for reliable event-based path reconstruction (the previous live set's tree had grown across many test runs). The receipt verifier is pool-independent (circuit-specific) and unchanged.

ui.buyer_generate: Share-receipt action on the Paid screen and on past-payment activity rows; names a recipient, proves the receipt in-browser (real two-step snarkjs), submits a real on-chain verify tx, outputs a copyable cowrie-receipt: blob.
ui.recipient_verify: /verify route (+ nav tab). Pastes a receipt and enters their own recipient id; the proof is verified on-chain against the receipt verifier using THEIR identity as R (never the blob's), then cross-checked against the on-chain SpendEvent. Shows only: paid + amount + merchant, with an explicit not-revealed list.

live_e2e.result: RECEIPT UI LOOP CLOSED ON LIVE POOL
live_e2e.wrong_recipient: REJECTED (non-replayable) — a different party verifying with its own id fails
